---
name: Skill Request
about: Request a new Marlin skill
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: skill-request
assignees: ''
---

## Skill name

Proposed name for the new skill (kebab-case):

## What problem does it solve?

Describe the gap in Marlin's current capabilities that this skill would fill.

## What domain does it target?

- [ ] General (cross-domain)
- [ ] web-api
- [ ] data-pipeline
- [ ] agent-task
- [ ] New domain: ___

## Example input

```
Provide a realistic input prompt that this skill would handle.
```

## Expected output

```json
{
  "show": "what the compressed output should look like"
}
```

## Why existing skills don't cover this

Explain why the current 11 skills (structured, compact, dense, domain, intent-parser, schema-normalizer, key-shortener, value-encoder, output-formatter, token-estimator, dsl-bridge) cannot handle this use case.

## Additional context

Any other information that would help in designing this skill.
